content.json:
# Yonchee Bot — Usage, Cost & Health

Use the **Environment** filter to switch between dev and prod. Cost figures are **estimates** based on public Azure list prices and may differ from your actual bill (region/tier/commitment discounts).

parameters.name: Environment
parameters.label: Environment
parameters.query:
traces
| where message == 'UsageMetrics'
| extend bot_env = tostring(customDimensions.bot_env)
| distinct bot_env
| order by bot_env asc

content.title: Estimated Azure cost for selected period

content.query:
let data = traces
| where message == 'UsageMetrics'
| where tostring(customDimensions.bot_env) == '{Environment}'
| where tostring(customDimensions.status) != 'failure';
union
(data | summarize Metric = 'Files processed', Value = todouble(count())),
(data | summarize Metric = 'OCR pages', Value = todouble(sum(toint(customDimensions.ocr_pages)))),
(data | summarize Metric = 'TTS characters', Value = todouble(sum(toint(customDimensions.tts_chars))))
content.title: Totals for selected period

content.query:
traces
| where message == 'UsageMetrics'
| where tostring(customDimensions.bot_env) == '{Environment}'
| where tostring(customDimensions.status) != 'failure'
| summarize daily = sum(toint(customDimensions.ocr_pages)) by bin(timestamp, 1d)
| order by timestamp asc
| serialize ['OCR pages (cumulative)'] = row_cumsum(daily)
| project timestamp, ['OCR pages (cumulative)']
content.title: OCR pages — cumulative (running total)

content.query:
traces
| where message == 'UsageMetrics'
| where tostring(customDimensions.bot_env) == '{Environment}'
| where tostring(customDimensions.status) != 'failure'
| summarize daily = sum(toint(customDimensions.tts_chars)) by bin(timestamp, 1d)
| order by timestamp asc
| serialize ['TTS characters (cumulative)'] = row_cumsum(daily)
| project timestamp, ['TTS characters (cumulative)']
content.title: TTS characters — cumulative (running total)

content.query:
traces
| where message == 'UsageMetrics'
| where tostring(customDimensions.bot_env) == '{Environment}'
| where tostring(customDimensions.status) != 'failure'
| summarize ['Files'] = count(), ['OCR pages'] = sum(toint(customDimensions.ocr_pages)), ['TTS characters'] = sum(toint(customDimensions.tts_chars)) by Language = tostring(customDimensions.language)
| order by ['Files'] desc
content.title: Breakdown by language

content.query:
let data = traces | where message == 'UsageMetrics' | where tostring(customDimensions.bot_env) == '{Environment}';
union
(data | summarize Metric = 'Unique users', Value = todouble(dcount(tostring(customDimensions.user_id)))),
(data | where tostring(customDimensions.status) != 'failure' | summarize Metric = 'Successful requests', Value = todouble(count()))
content.title: User totals

content.query:
traces
| where message == 'UsageMetrics'
| where tostring(customDimensions.bot_env) == '{Environment}'
| summarize ['Active users'] = dcount(tostring(customDimensions.user_id)) by bin(timestamp, 1d)
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Active users per day

content.query:
traces
| where message == 'UsageMetrics'
| where tostring(customDimensions.bot_env) == '{Environment}'
| where tostring(customDimensions.status) != 'failure'
| summarize Files = count(), ['OCR pages'] = sum(toint(customDimensions.ocr_pages)), ['TTS chars'] = sum(toint(customDimensions.tts_chars)) by User = tostring(customDimensions.user_id)
| order by Files desc
| take 20
content.title: Top 20 users
Reliability

content.query:
traces
| where message == 'UsageMetrics'
| where tostring(customDimensions.bot_env) == '{Environment}'
| where tostring(customDimensions.status) == 'failure'
| summarize Count = count() by Reason = tostring(customDimensions.reason)
| order by Count desc
content.title: Failures by reason

content.query:
traces
| where message == 'UsageMetrics'
| where tostring(customDimensions.bot_env) == '{Environment}'
| summarize Success = countif(tostring(customDimensions.status) != 'failure'), Failure = countif(tostring(customDimensions.status) == 'failure') by bin(timestamp, 1d)
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Success vs failure over time

content.query:
let d = traces | where message == 'UsageMetrics' | where tostring(customDimensions.bot_env) == '{Environment}' | where isnotempty(customDimensions.duration_ms) | extend dur = toint(customDimensions.duration_ms);
union
(d | summarize Metric = 'p50 latency (s)', Value = round(percentile(dur, 50) / 1000.0, 1)),
(d | summarize Metric = 'p95 latency (s)', Value = round(percentile(dur, 95) / 1000.0, 1)),
(d | summarize Metric = 'Max latency (s)', Value = round(todouble(max(dur)) / 1000.0, 1))
content.title: Processing latency

content.query:
traces
| where message == 'UsageMetrics'
| where tostring(customDimensions.bot_env) == '{Environment}'
| where isnotempty(customDimensions.duration_ms)
| summarize ['p50 (s)'] = round(percentile(toint(customDimensions.duration_ms), 50) / 1000.0, 1), ['p95 (s)'] = round(percentile(toint(customDimensions.duration_ms), 95) / 1000.0, 1) by bin(timestamp, 1d)
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Processing latency over time

content.query:
traces
| where message == 'UsageMetrics'
| where tostring(customDimensions.bot_env) == '{Environment}'
| where isnotempty(customDimensions.file_type)
| summarize Count = count() by ['File type'] = tostring(customDimensions.file_type)
content.title: File type breakdown

content.query:
traces
| where message == 'UsageMetrics'
| where tostring(customDimensions.bot_env) == '{Environment}'
| where isnotempty(customDimensions.file_size_kb)
| extend kb = toint(customDimensions.file_size_kb)
| summarize Count = count() by ['Size'] = case(kb < 100, '1. <100 KB', kb < 500, '2. 100-500 KB', kb < 2000, '3. 0.5-2 MB', kb < 5000, '4. 2-5 MB', '5. >5 MB')
| order by ['Size'] asc
content.title: File size distribution
Support funnel totals

content.query:
traces
| where message == 'GrowthMetrics'
| where tostring(customDimensions.bot_env) == '{Environment}'
| extend Event = tostring(customDimensions.event_type)
| where Event in ('support_view', 'support_pack_click', 'support_request_created', 'support_bonus_granted', 'support_request_rejected')
| summarize Count = count() by Event
| order by Count desc
content.title: Support events breakdown

content.query:
let g = traces
| where message == 'GrowthMetrics'
| where tostring(customDimensions.bot_env) == '{Environment}'
| extend e = tostring(customDimensions.event_type)
| summarize prompts = countif(e == 'precost_prompt_shown'), confirms = countif(e == 'precost_confirm'), cancels = countif(e == 'precost_cancel');
let prompts = todouble(coalesce(toscalar(g | project prompts), 0));
let confirms = todouble(coalesce(toscalar(g | project confirms), 0));
let cancels = todouble(coalesce(toscalar(g | project cancels), 0));
union
(print Metric = 'Pre-cost prompts', Value = prompts),
(print Metric = 'Confirmed', Value = confirms),
(print Metric = 'Canceled', Value = cancels),
(print Metric = 'Confirm rate %', Value = iff(prompts == 0, 0.0, round(100.0 * confirms / prompts, 1))),
(print Metric = 'Cancel rate %', Value = iff(prompts == 0, 0.0, round(100.0 * cancels / prompts, 1)))
content.title: Pre-cost confirmation

content.query:
traces
| where message == 'GrowthMetrics'
| where tostring(customDimensions.bot_env) == '{Environment}'
| extend Event = tostring(customDimensions.event_type)
| where Event in ('onboarding_start', 'support_view', 'support_pack_click', 'support_bonus_granted', 'precost_prompt_shown', 'precost_confirm', 'precost_cancel')
| summarize Count = count() by bin(timestamp, 1d), Event
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Growth/support events over time

content.json:
## 🖥 Infrastructure (Azure Monitor metrics)

These charts read platform metrics from the Container App resource. Pick which app to show with the **Container App** selector below (separate from the Environment filter above).
